arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool fans may be intrigued to see an update this afternoon from transfer journalist Fabrizio Romano. Although Romano doesn’t specifically mention the Gunners or the Reds, he has said that Premier League clubs are already making contacts over signing highly-rated young Ajax defender Jorrel Hato ahead of the summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target set to cost €70million

It already looks like the Zubimendi to Arsenal deal is advanced ahead of next season, but it could still be that there are some details to work out. arts.ttl: Inter Milan looking to sign Arsenal player on the cheap – Plan in the works
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has been a bit-part player for Arsenal this season. The Ukrainian has made 13 appearances in all competitions, playing a little over 400 minutes. He has remained on the bench in the club’s last two games. As his game time continues to reduce at Arsenal, Zinchenko’s future is therefore under some question.
